title: hieracium submutabile
intro: Hieracium submutabile, also known as hawkweed or Hieracium, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Hieracium submutabile include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a valuable herb for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Hieracium submutabile include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
